query: ("emergency medicine"[MeSH Terms] OR "critical care"[MeSH Terms] OR "intensive care units"[MeSH Terms] OR "sepsis"[MeSH Terms] OR "shock"[MeSH Terms] OR resuscitation[Title/Abstract] OR airway[Title/Abstract] OR trauma[Title/Abstract]) AND humans[MeSH Terms]

topPapers.title: Early versus delayed enteral nutrition in patients with sepsis: a propensity score-matched cohort study at a tertiary hospital in Hebei, China.
topPapers.oneLineSummary: In a single-center retrospective sepsis cohort, early enteral nutrition (within 2 days) was associated with higher 28- and 60-day mortality than delayed feeding.
topPapers.oneLineSummary_ko: 단일기관 후향적 패혈증 코호트에서 조기 경장영양(2일 이내)은 지연 영양보다 28일 및 60일 사망률이 더 높게 연관되었다.
topPapers.whyItMatters: Guidelines often encourage early enteral feeding in critically ill patients, but this observational signal of harm in sepsis—especially in sicker, vasopressor-dependent patients—challenges a one-size-fits-all approach and supports individualized feeding timing.
topPapers.whyItMatters_ko: 지침은 흔히 중환자에서 조기 경장영양을 권장하지만, 패혈증(특히 더 중증이고 승압제를 사용하는 환자)에서 해로움 신호를 보여 일률적 접근에 의문을 제기하고 개별화된 영양 시점을 뒷받침한다.
topPapers.clinicalQuestion: In adult ICU patients with sepsis, does early enteral nutrition (within 2 days) versus delayed enteral nutrition (2–7 days) affect short-term mortality and clinical outcomes?
topPapers.clinicalQuestion_ko: 성인 패혈증 중환자에서 조기 경장영양(2일 이내)은 지연 경장영양(2~7일)에 비해 단기 사망률 및 임상 결과에 영향을 미치는가?

studyDetails.design: Single-center retrospective cohort study using propensity score matching (PSM), with confirmatory multivariable Cox regression and inverse probability weighting (IPW). Note: the screening study-type signal labeled this an RCT, but the abstract, MeSH terms (Retrospective Studies, Observational Study), and design statement confirm it is observational/retrospective.
studyDetails.design_ko: 성향점수매칭(PSM)을 사용한 단일기관 후향적 코호트 연구로, 다변량 Cox 회귀 및 역확률가중(IPW)으로 보강함. 참고: 선별 연구유형 신호는 RCT로 표기했으나 초록, MeSH 용어(후향적 연구, 관찰연구), 설계 기술 모두 관찰/후향적 연구임을 확인함.
studyDetails.setting: ICU of a tertiary hospital (The Second Hospital of Hebei Medical University, Shijiazhuang, Hebei Province, China), January 2015 to December 2024.
studyDetails.setting_ko: 중국 허베이성 스자좡 허베이의과대학 제2병원 중환자실, 2015년 1월~2024년 12월.
studyDetails.sampleSize: Overall cohort of 2205 adult sepsis patients: early EN (EEN) 1500 (68.0%) and delayed EN 705 (32.0%). The analysis describes 2205 propensity score-matched patients; the exact post-matching matched-pair denominators per arm are not available in the accessible sources.
studyDetails.sampleSize_ko: 전체 코호트 2205명의 성인 패혈증 환자: 조기 경장영양(EEN) 1500명(68.0%), 지연 경장영양 705명(32.0%). 분석은 2205명의 성향점수매칭 환자를 기술하나, 매칭 후 군별 정확한 인원수는 제공된 자료에서 확인되지 않음.
studyDetails.eligibility: Adult ICU patients with sepsis meeting Sepsis-3.0 criteria, admitted Jan 2015–Dec 2024, who began enteral nutrition within 7 days of admission. Exclusion criteria are not detailed in the accessible sources.
studyDetails.eligibility_ko: Sepsis-3.0 기준을 충족하고 입원 후 7일 이내 경장영양을 시작한 성인 패혈증 중환자(2015년 1월~2024년 12월). 제외 기준은 제공된 자료에 상세히 없음.
studyDetails.interventionDetails: Early enteral nutrition (EEN): EN initiated within 2 days of admission. Feeding route, formula, caloric/protein targets, and volume are not available in the accessible sources.
studyDetails.interventionDetails_ko: 조기 경장영양(EEN): 입원 후 2일 이내 경장영양 시작. 투여 경로, 제제, 열량/단백 목표, 용량은 제공된 자료에서 확인되지 않음.
studyDetails.comparatorDetails: Delayed enteral nutrition: EN initiated between 2 and 7 days of admission. Specific protocol details are not available in the accessible sources.
studyDetails.comparatorDetails_ko: 지연 경장영양: 입원 후 2~7일 사이 경장영양 시작. 구체적 프로토콜은 제공된 자료에서 확인되지 않음.
studyDetails.followUp: Mortality outcomes assessed at 28 and 60 days.
studyDetails.sourceBasis: Based on the published abstract, Crossref metadata, and the BMJ Open DOI landing page; no PMCID was available for open full-text retrieval.
studyDetails.sourceBasis_ko: 출판된 초록, Crossref 메타데이터, BMJ Open DOI 랜딩 페이지에 기반함; 전문 확보를 위한 PMCID는 없었음.

pico.population: Adult ICU patients with sepsis (Sepsis-3.0) who began enteral nutrition within 7 days
pico.intervention: Early enteral nutrition initiated within 2 days of admission
pico.comparison: Delayed enteral nutrition initiated 2–7 days after admission
pico.outcome: 28-day and 60-day mortality; ICU/hospital stay, ventilation duration, nutrition-related complications

pico_ko.population: 입원 7일 이내 경장영양을 시작한 성인 패혈증(Sepsis-3.0) 중환자
pico_ko.outcome: 28일 및 60일 사망률; ICU/재원 기간, 인공호흡 기간, 영양 관련 합병증

detailedPico.population: 2205 adult ICU patients with sepsis meeting Sepsis-3.0 criteria at a tertiary hospital in Hebei, China, who started EN within 7 days; cohort included male and female, middle-aged and older patients. Subgroup signals were noted in younger males with BMI <24 kg/m², abdominal infections, severe sepsis, and those needing norepinephrine equivalent ≥0.1 µg/kg/min.
detailedPico.population_ko: 허베이 소재 3차 병원에서 7일 이내 경장영양을 시작한 Sepsis-3.0 기준 성인 패혈증 중환자 2205명; 남녀, 중년 및 고령 환자 포함. 하위군 신호는 BMI <24 kg/m²의 젊은 남성, 복강내 감염, 중증 패혈증, 노르에피네프린 등가용량 ≥0.1 µg/kg/min 필요 환자에서 관찰됨.
detailedPico.countrySetting: Single tertiary hospital ICU in Hebei Province, China (2015–2024).
detailedPico.intervention: Early enteral nutrition (EEN) started within 2 days of admission (n=1500, 68.0% of cohort).
detailedPico.intervention_ko: 입원 2일 이내 시작한 조기 경장영양(EEN)(n=1500, 코호트의 68.0%).
detailedPico.comparator: Delayed enteral nutrition started 2–7 days after admission (n=705, 32.0% of cohort).
detailedPico.comparator_ko: 입원 후 2~7일에 시작한 지연 경장영양(n=705, 코호트의 32.0%).

outcomes.label: Primary
outcomes.result: Higher risk with EEN after PSM (HR 1.44, 95% CI 1.08 to 1.92), confirmed by multivariable Cox regression and IPW.
outcomes.result_ko: PSM 후 EEN에서 위험 증가(HR 1.44, 95% CI 1.08~1.92), 다변량 Cox 회귀 및 IPW로 확인.
outcomes.interpretation: Patients fed early had about 44% higher relative hazard of dying by 28 days, and the CI excludes 1, indicating a statistically significant association.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 조기 영양 환자는 28일 사망 위험이 상대적으로 약 44% 높았고, 신뢰구간이 1을 넘지 않아 통계적으로 유의한 연관성을 시사한다.
outcomes.statPrimer: HR of 1 means no difference in hazard; above 1 means more events with the intervention. A 95% CI that does not cross 1 indicates conventional statistical significance.
outcomes.statPrimer_ko: HR 1은 위험 차이 없음을 의미하며, 1보다 크면 중재군에서 사건이 더 많음을 뜻한다. 95% CI가 1을 포함하지 않으면 통상적 통계적 유의성을 나타낸다.

outcomes.label: Primary
outcomes.result: Higher risk with EEN (HR 1.45, 95% CI 1.11 to 1.89).
outcomes.interpretation: The mortality signal persisted at 60 days with a similar ~45% higher hazard and a CI excluding 1.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 사망 신호는 60일에도 유지되어 약 45% 더 높은 위험과 1을 넘지 않는 신뢰구간을 보였다.
outcomes.statPrimer: HR above 1 with a 95% CI that stays above 1 indicates a statistically significant increase in the rate of events over follow-up.
outcomes.statPrimer_ko: HR이 1보다 크고 95% CI가 1보다 위에 머물면 추적 기간 동안 사건 발생률의 통계적으로 유의한 증가를 의미한다.

outcomes.label: Secondary
outcomes.result: More frequent with EEN (OR 1.77, 95% CI 1.14 to 2.79).
outcomes.interpretation: Early feeding was associated with roughly 77% higher odds of gastric retention, with a CI excluding 1.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 조기 영양은 위 정체 오즈가 약 77% 높게 연관되었고, 신뢰구간이 1을 넘지 않았다.
outcomes.statPrimer: OR of 1 means no difference in odds; above 1 means higher odds with the intervention. A 95% CI not crossing 1 indicates statistical significance.
outcomes.statPrimer_ko: OR 1은 오즈 차이 없음을 의미하며, 1보다 크면 중재군에서 오즈가 높음을 뜻한다. 95% CI가 1을 넘지 않으면 통계적 유의성을 나타낸다.

outcomes.label: Secondary
outcomes.outcome: Hospital/ICU length of stay, mechanical ventilation duration
outcomes.result: Prespecified secondary outcomes; specific numeric results are not available in the accessible sources.
outcomes.result_ko: 사전 지정된 이차 결과이나, 구체적 수치는 제공된 자료에서 확인되지 않음.
outcomes.interpretation: These length-of-stay and ventilation outcomes were measured but their values are not reported in the abstract or available metadata.
outcomes.interpretation_ko: 재원 기간 및 인공호흡 결과는 측정되었으나 초록이나 가용 메타데이터에 수치가 보고되지 않았다.
outcomes.statPrimer: Without reported effect estimates or CIs, no statistical inference can be drawn for these outcomes.
outcomes.statPrimer_ko: 보고된 효과 추정치나 신뢰구간이 없으면 이 결과들에 대한 통계적 추론은 불가능하다.

keyFindings: After propensity score matching, early EN (within 2 days) was associated with higher 28-day (HR 1.44, 95% CI 1.08–1.92) and 60-day (HR 1.45, 95% CI 1.11–1.89) mortality versus delayed EN, supported by multivariable Cox regression and IPW.
Early EN was associated with more gastric retention (OR 1.77, 95% CI 1.14–2.79).
Excess mortality risk was most pronounced in younger males with BMI <24 kg/m², abdominal infections, severe sepsis, and those needing norepinephrine equivalent ≥0.1 µg/kg/min.
keyFindings_ko: 성향점수매칭 후 조기 경장영양(2일 이내)은 지연 영양 대비 28일(HR 1.44, 95% CI 1.08–1.92) 및 60일(HR 1.45, 95% CI 1.11–1.89) 사망률이 더 높게 연관되었고, 다변량 Cox 회귀 및 IPW로 뒷받침됨.
조기 경장영양은 위 정체가 더 많았음(OR 1.77, 95% CI 1.14–2.79).
초과 사망 위험은 BMI <24 kg/m²의 젊은 남성, 복강내 감염, 중증 패혈증, 노르에피네프린 등가용량 ≥0.1 µg/kg/min 필요 환자에서 가장 두드러짐.
topPapers.conclusion: In this retrospective propensity score-matched cohort of 2205 septic ICU patients, early enteral nutrition was associated with higher short-term mortality and more gastric retention, particularly in younger males and more severely ill patients, suggesting individualized rather than universal early feeding. The authors emphasize these are preliminary, hypothesis-generating findings requiring confirmation by randomized controlled trials.
topPapers.conclusion_ko: 2205명의 패혈증 중환자를 대상으로 한 이 후향적 성향점수매칭 코호트에서 조기 경장영양은 단기 사망률 증가 및 위 정체 증가와 연관되었으며, 특히 젊은 남성과 더 중증 환자에서 두드러져 일률적 조기 영양보다 개별화된 접근을 시사한다. 저자들은 이는 가설 생성적 예비 결과로 무작위대조시험을 통한 확인이 필요하다고 강조한다.
topPapers.clinicalTakeaway: In sepsis, routinely rushing enteral nutrition within 48 hours may not be beneficial and could be associated with harm in hemodynamically unstable, vasopressor-dependent, or abdominal-infection patients; consider individualized timing and tolerance assessment rather than universal early feeding—pending randomized confirmation.
topPapers.clinicalTakeaway_ko: 패혈증에서 48시간 이내 경장영양을 일률적으로 서두르는 것이 이롭지 않을 수 있으며, 혈역학적으로 불안정하거나 승압제 의존, 복강내 감염 환자에서는 해로움과 연관될 수 있다; 무작위 확인 전까지 일률적 조기 영양보다 개별화된 시점과 내약성 평가를 고려하라.
topPapers.limitations: Single-center retrospective observational design limits causal inference; residual and unmeasured confounding by indication (sicker patients may be fed later, or unstable patients fed early) cannot be excluded despite PSM, Cox adjustment, and IPW. Exact matched sample sizes per arm, baseline balance, feeding protocol (route, calories, protein, volume), and numeric secondary-outcome results are not available in the accessible sources. Findings are from one Chinese tertiary ICU (2015–2024), limiting generalizability. The screening pipeline mislabeled this as an RCT; it is observational, so causality should not be inferred.
topPapers.limitations_ko: 단일기관 후향적 관찰 설계로 인과 추론이 제한됨; PSM, Cox 보정, IPW에도 불구하고 적응증에 의한 잔여 및 미측정 교란(더 중증 환자가 늦게 영양받거나 불안정 환자가 일찍 영양받을 수 있음)을 배제할 수 없음. 군별 정확한 매칭 인원수, 기저 균형, 영양 프로토콜(경로, 열량, 단백, 용량), 이차 결과의 수치는 제공된 자료에서 확인되지 않음. 결과는 단일 중국 3차 ICU(2015~2024) 자료로 일반화가 제한됨. 선별 시스템이 이를 RCT로 잘못 분류했으나 실제로는 관찰연구이므로 인과성을 추론해서는 안 됨.
topPapers.edIcuApplicability: Directly relevant to ICU and ED clinicians managing sepsis who decide on enteral feeding timing. The data are observational and hypothesis-generating, so they should not override current guideline-based practice, but they reinforce caution about aggressive early feeding in hemodynamically unstable, high vasopressor-requirement, or abdominal-infection sepsis patients and support tolerance-guided, individualized initiation. Definitive guidance awaits RCTs.
topPapers.edIcuApplicability_ko: 경장영양 시점을 결정하는 패혈증 진료 ICU 및 응급의학 임상의에게 직접 관련됨. 자료는 관찰적·가설 생성적이므로 현행 지침 기반 진료를 대체해서는 안 되나, 혈역학적 불안정, 고용량 승압제 필요, 복강내 감염 패혈증 환자에서 공격적 조기 영양에 대한 주의를 강화하고 내약성 기반 개별화 시작을 뒷받침한다. 확정적 권고는 RCT를 기다려야 한다.
analysisNotes: Study-type signal labeled this as a Randomized Controlled Trial, but the abstract, design statement, and MeSH terms (Retrospective Studies, Observational Study, Propensity Score) confirm it is a retrospective PSM cohort—flagged for manual review.
No PMCID available; analysis based on abstract, Crossref, and BMJ Open DOI landing page only.
Exact post-matching per-arm denominators, baseline balance tables, feeding protocol details, and numeric secondary outcomes (LOS, ventilation duration) were not available in accessible sources.
Observational design with potential confounding by indication; causal language avoided consistent with authors' call for RCT confirmation.

paper.title: Early versus delayed enteral nutrition in patients with sepsis: a propensity score-matched cohort study at a tertiary hospital in Hebei, China.
paper.abstract:
OBJECTIVES: Enteral nutrition (EN) constitutes a critical therapeutic intervention in the management of patients with sepsis; however, the optimal timing for its initiation remains uncertain. This study sought to evaluate the impact of early versus delayed EN on mortality rates and clinical outcomes among adult patients with sepsis in intensive care units (ICU).
DESIGN: Retrospective cohort study using propensity score matching (PSM) methodology.
SETTING: A tertiary hospital ICU in Hebei Province, China, from 2015 to 2024.
PARTICIPANTS: This retrospective analysis involved adult ICU patients with sepsis (meeting Sepsis 3.0 criteria) from January 2015 to December 2024 who began EN within 7 days of admission. Patients were classified into early (within 2 days) or delayed (2-7 days) EN groups based on when nutrition was initiated.
PRIMARY AND SECONDARY OUTCOME MEASURES: Primary outcomes were 28-day and 60-day mortality, with secondary outcomes including hospital/ICU stay length, mechanical ventilation duration and nutrition-related complications.
RESULTS: A study of 2205 patients compared early EN (EEN) in 1500 patients (68.0%) with delayed EN in 705 patients (32.0%). After PSM, the EEN group showed a higher mortality risk at 28 days (HR 1.44, 95% CI 1.08 to 1.92) and 60 days (HR 1.45, 95% CI 1.11 to 1.89), confirmed by multivariable Cox regression and inverse probability weighting. EEN patients also had more gastric retention (OR 1.77, 95% CI 1.14 to 2.79). The increased mortality risk was notably pronounced in younger male patients with a body mass index of less than 24 kg/m², abdominal infections, those with severe sepsis and patients necessitating vasopressor support at a norepinephrine equivalent of ≥0.1 µg/kg/min. Sensitivity analyses supported these findings.
CONCLUSIONS: Our retrospective analysis of 2205 propensity score-matched patients with sepsis found that EEN is linked to higher short-term mortality, especially in younger males, those with severe illness, abdominal infections or needing moderate to high vasopressor support. This suggests that personalised nutritional timing might be better than universal early feeding. However, these findings are preliminary and need confirmation through randomised controlled trials.
authorAffiliations: Department of Critical Care Medicine, The Second Hospital of Hebei Medical University, Shijiazhuang, China.
Department of Critical Care Medicine, The Second Hospital of Hebei Medical University, Shijiazhuang, China 26901145@hebmu.edu.cn.

candidates.title: Early versus delayed enteral nutrition in patients with sepsis: a propensity score-matched cohort study at a tertiary hospital in Hebei, China.
candidates.abstract:
OBJECTIVES: Enteral nutrition (EN) constitutes a critical therapeutic intervention in the management of patients with sepsis; however, the optimal timing for its initiation remains uncertain. This study sought to evaluate the impact of early versus delayed EN on mortality rates and clinical outcomes among adult patients with sepsis in intensive care units (ICU).
DESIGN: Retrospective cohort study using propensity score matching (PSM) methodology.
SETTING: A tertiary hospital ICU in Hebei Province, China, from 2015 to 2024.
PARTICIPANTS: This retrospective analysis involved adult ICU patients with sepsis (meeting Sepsis 3.0 criteria) from January 2015 to December 2024 who began EN within 7 days of admission. Patients were classified into early (within 2 days) or delayed (2-7 days) EN groups based on when nutrition was initiated.
PRIMARY AND SECONDARY OUTCOME MEASURES: Primary outcomes were 28-day and 60-day mortality, with secondary outcomes including hospital/ICU stay length, mechanical ventilation duration and nutrition-related complications.
RESULTS: A study of 2205 patients compared early EN (EEN) in 1500 patients (68.0%) with delayed EN in 705 patients (32.0%). After PSM, the EEN group showed a higher mortality risk at 28 days (HR 1.44, 95% CI 1.08 to 1.92) and 60 days (HR 1.45, 95% CI 1.11 to 1.89), confirmed by multivariable Cox regression and inverse probability weighting. EEN patients also had more gastric retention (OR 1.77, 95% CI 1.14 to 2.79). The increased mortality risk was notably pronounced in younger male patients with a body mass index of less than 24 kg/m², abdominal infections, those with severe sepsis and patients necessitating vasopressor support at a norepinephrine equivalent of ≥0.1 µg/kg/min. Sensitivity analyses supported these findings.
CONCLUSIONS: Our retrospective analysis of 2205 propensity score-matched patients with sepsis found that EEN is linked to higher short-term mortality, especially in younger males, those with severe illness, abdominal infections or needing moderate to high vasopressor support. This suggests that personalised nutritional timing might be better than universal early feeding. However, these findings are preliminary and need confirmation through randomised controlled trials.
